Landing.title: Finance with a Pulse.
Landing.subtitle: Revolutionizing institutional debt through empathetic AI and human-centric advocacy. Join the movement toward a more equitable financial future.
Landing.comingSoon: The New Standard in Debt Resolution
Landing.success: Thank you! We will notify you.

manifesto.title: The Manifesto
manifesto.pillar1Desc: AI (Nova) that listens before it acts. We prioritize the human story over the ledger entry.
manifesto.pillar2Desc: Clear paths to resolution with no legal jargon. We believe clarity is the foundation of trust.
manifesto.pillar3Desc: Focus on credit rehabilitation, not just one-time payment. We solve for the long-term health of the borrower.
